transcript:
CALLER: Haan, hello. Main appointment cancel karna chahta hoon. Actually main bahar hun out of town, wapas aa nahi sakta.
AGENT: Koi baat nahi. Aapka naam aur registered number?
CALLER: Devendra Pawar. 9822334455.
AGENT: Aapki appointment Dr. Hemant Shirke ke saath, kal dono baje ki hai. Cancel karni hai ya shift karni hai?
CALLER: Shift karo, uh, agli week Friday ko same time rakh sako toh.
AGENT: Friday next week, 2 PM — Dr. Shirke available hain. Confirm karta hoon?
CALLER: Haan, confirm karo.
AGENT: Ho gayi reschedule! Friday agle hafte, 2 PM, Dr. Hemant Shirke ke saath. SMS aa jayega. Aap jaldi wapas aana!
CALLER: Haha, shukriya.
